description: Unified intake contract envelope (design plan section 1). Metadata only: it records what the prompt asked for and enforces nothing. Compiled once at query entry behind PG_INTAKE_CONTRACT_COMPILE (default off).

source_rules.note: Populated for disclosure only. NOTHING wires this to filter or mask the citeable corpus. journal-only stays DORMANT per operator veto. Activation requires operator sign-off + a full-benchmark A/B (design plan Phase 3, consult-first).

safety.faithfulness: The compiler reads/writes no strict_verify / provenance / faithfulness path. It produces intake metadata only.
safety.floor_non_droppable: The deterministic floor always runs; the LLM enrich may add fields but never removes floor detections.
safety.span_gate: Every LLM-claimed HARD narrowing field (a date year, a source language) is admitted only if its own verbatim/typed proof appears in the question; failed proof degrades loudly into warnings[].
safety.degraded_mode: llm_fn=None or any LLM failure yields a floor-only contract; an all-empty contract behaves like a flags-off run.
